## IMQOptions.clusterManagers property

Array of cluster managers used to handle cluster operations. Any manager implements specific cluster server detection.

 {<!-- -->ClusterManager\[\]<!-- -->}

**Signature:**

```typescript
clusterManagers?: ClusterManager[];
```
